title: Founder's Associate
must_haves: Exposure to startup or high-growth environments (must-have)
5+ years in operations, strategy or business management
hard_blockers: Role closed - no longer accepting applications
one_line_verdict: Closed; was a 5+yr ops/strategy edtech FA - reasonable generalist fit but off-domain and now unavailable.
fetch_note: Confirmed closed via Emerge Capital VC job board. MyEdSpace = edtech, $15m Series A. A 'Founder's Intern' variant remains on myedspace.co.uk but the Associate role is closed.
